FileName:  DCUJ2_20220412000000_N01_XBT
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CallSign     | DCUJ2
ShipName     | Chicago Express
Speed        | 16.0 kt
Direction    | 72.0 ｰ
Date         | 4-12-2022 00:00
Latitude     | 34.12033 ｰ
Longitude    | -44.4175 ｰ
Water Depth  | 0.0 m
Line         | AX07
Transect No. | 1.0
Sequence No. | 167.0
Agency       | USA, NOAA Atlantic Oceanographic and Meteorological Laboratories (AOML) ( 840001 )
MSGType      | 3
SEAS version | 1023.0
Launcher     | AOML XBT V8.1 Autolauncher (up to 8 Deep Blue and Fast Deep probes) ( 32.0 )
LaunchHeight | 1300.0 m
Recorder     | Sippican MK-21 ( 6 )  -Frequency: 10.0 Hz
Probe        | Sippican Deep Blue ( 52 ) -SN: 1274419 -Max Depth: 760 -CoefA: 6.691 -CoefB: -2.25
Samples      | 1559
Rider        | -Name: Christian Saiz -Email: christian.saiz@noaa.gov -Institution: NOAA/AOML -Phone: 305-361-4450
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
